title: sclarea glutinosa
intro: Sclarea glutinosa, commonly known as clary sage, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of clary sage include its ability to reduce inflammation and anxiety due to the presence of chemicals such as linalool and linalyl acetate. The health benefits of clary sage include its use in relieving menstrual cramps, promoting better sleep, and reducing stress levels. Clary sage is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
